setup_contract: Resolve repo-level agents, skills, plugins, and topology before host-specific prompting.
When the VS Code host is unavailable, fall back to the Codex CLI-compatible execution contract without changing repo semantics.
Preserve sequential and parallel scheduling decisions from .ghdp/orchestrate/topology.json.
Honor the repo-selected compatibility model for headless Codex CLI execution so the same sub-agent contract can still run outside the VS Code host.
